character.name: Isometric pixel art character, 3/4 front-facing pose, 92×92 sprite. A lean ranger in mottled olive-and-brown hooded cloak, leather bracers, soft boots for silent tread. Longbow in one hand, quiver of fletched arrows on back, skinning knife at belt. Hood shadowing sharp alert eyes, bit of stubble, face-paint stripe. Coiled rope and a small snare trap hanging from belt. Tracker's posture — weight low, ready. Palette: olive green #4A5D23, tan leather #8B7355, pale khaki #D4C5A8. Limited 16-color palette, crisp pixels, no anti-aliasing. Dark fantasy MUD aesthetic.
